scope_note: Goal Kicker currently exports testing-policy summaries for this school. If official score distributions were not captured, the panel stays policy-only rather than inventing ranges.
policy: Johns Hopkins University requires standardized testing for first-year applicants; the official Application Deadlines & Requirements page says standardized test scores are required and reviewed as part of the holistic application review.

claims.claim: Johns Hopkins University requires standardized testing for first-year applicants; the official Application Deadlines & Requirements page says standardized test scores are required and reviewed as part of the holistic application review.
